x-enumeration-literals.name: Currency Data
x-enumeration-literals.description:
ISO 4217 currency codes (e.g., USD = US Dollar, JPY = Japanese Yen, EUR = Euro)
Decimal precision rules (e.g., JPY has no fractional units; USD has 2 decimal places)
Currency symbols ($, ¥, €)
Currency holidays or settlement calendars

x-enumeration-literals.name: Country Data
x-enumeration-literals.description:
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 / alpha-3 country codes (US / USA, GB / GBR)
Official country names in multiple languages
Country-to-currency mappings (e.g., Japan → JPY)
Country risk classifications (e.g., OECD ratings, sanctions lists)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market and Segment Identifiers
x-enumeration-literals.description:
MIC codes (ISO 10383) for market identification , e.g., XNYS (New York Stock Exchange), XLON (London Stock Exchange)
Industry classification schemes, e.g., GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) or NAICS codes
Market segment IDs (retail, institutional, corporate)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Instrument Reference Data
x-enumeration-literals.description:
ISINs (International Securities Identification Number)
SEDOLs, CUSIPs
Bloomberg Tickers, Reuters RIC codes
Instrument type classifications (bond, equity, derivative)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory and Compliance Reference Data
x-enumeration-literals.description:
LEIs (Legal Entity Identifiers)
FATCA country classifications
Sanctions and embargo lists (OFAC, EU, UN)
